title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
abstract: Voyager is the first LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent that drives exploration, masters a wide range of skills, and makes new discoveries continually without human intervention in Minecraft.
key_components: Skill library for storing and retrieving complex behaviors
Iterative prompting mechanism that generates executable code for embodied control

technical_approach.action_space: Code instead of low-level motor commands
technical_approach.training: No explicit gradient-based training or finetuning

key_contributions: First LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent
Outperforms baselines in discovering new items and skills
claims: Voyager discovers new Minecraft items and skills continually by self-driven exploration
Voyager has capabilities similar to human players in Minecraft
